summary: Phase 1 nearly complete. Created IncrementalTimeline.lean with stage-indexed timeline types, finiteness proofs, LocallyFiniteOrder instances, and embedding to full timeline. File compiles via LSP but lake build verification pending.

artifacts.summary: Stage-indexed timeline infrastructure: DiscreteTimelineQuot_at_stage, LocallyFiniteOrder at each stage, embedding to full timeline

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 definitions and proofs complete. IncrementalTimeline.lean compiles via LSP (lean_goal shows no errors). Lake build times out due to long compilation time (2GB memory usage). Build verification can be completed in successor session.

next_steps: Verify lake build passes, then proceed to Phase 2 (Stage Embedding and Successor)
